nasb.text: But Peter and John answered and said to them, “Whether it is right in the sight of God to give heed to you rather than to God, you be the judge;

esv.text: But Peter and John answered them, “Whether it is right in the sight of God to listen to you rather than to God, you must judge,

cnv.text: 彼得和約翰回答：“聽從你們過於聽從　神，在　神面前對不對，你們自己說吧！

ccb.text: 但彼得和约翰答道：“要我们听从你们而不听从上帝，这在上帝看来合理吗？你们自己想想吧。

csbs.text: 可是彼得和约翰回答说：“听从你们过于听从神，在神面前是理所当然的吗？你们自己判断吧！
